STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY_POWER.desc: You lose 1 max HP each turn unless you are poisoned.
STS2_MULUNDUS-ABYSSAL_JOURNEY_POWER.smar: You lose 1 max HP each turn unless you are poisoned.
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH_POWER.des: Each attack you play this turn is played an additional time.
STS2_MULUNDUS-INVOKE_YOUR_OATH_POWER.sma: Each attack you play this turn is played an additional time.
STS2_MULUNDUS-SUGAR_RUSH_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, each card in your hand gains [gold]Ethereal.[/gold]
Whenever you play a [gold]Goodberry[/gold], draw a card.

Whenever you play a [gold]Goodberry[/gold], draw a card.
